pr.title: Add AGENTS.md with cloud development environment setup
pr.body: Adds `AGENTS.md` with cloud-specific development instructions for future Cursor Cloud agents. ## What's included - Key commands table (dev server, build, type-check, Rust build) - Caveats about Rust toolchain version requirements (≥1.85 for edition2024) - System library requirements for Tauri compilation on Linux - Notes on missing lint/test scripts and optional Supabase configuration - Guidance on web-only development mode (no windowing system in Cloud VM) ## Environment verification All development workflows were tested successfully: | Check | Result | |-------|--------| | `npm install` | ✅ All 98 packages installed | | `npx tsc -b` | ✅ Zero type errors | | `npm run build` | ✅ Production build succeeds | | `npm run dev` | ✅ Vite dev server on :5173 | | `cargo build` (src-tauri) | ✅ Compiles with Rust 1.95 | ## Demo [typeset_app_demo.mp4](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-535c7efb-7349-4936-9b48-1210fc296d8b/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Ftypeset_app_demo.mp4) [App loaded with demo projects](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-535c7efb-7349-4936-9b48-1210fc296d8b/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Ftypeset_app_loaded.webp) [Settings modal](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-535c7efb-7349-4936-9b48-1210fc296d8b/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Ftypeset_settings_modal.webp) To show artifacts inline, enable in settings.
pr.author: amagarian
